title: Bitclout
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by donateToReserves on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls donateToReserves() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Unusual pattern of flash loan followed by large reserves donation
monitoring_rules: BLOCK FLASHLOAN_BORROW -> DONATE_TO_RESERVES in single tx
summary: The attacker used a flash loan to temporarily access funds and then donated a large amount to the reserves, draining the protocol. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
